items.name: Scout's Nut Collection
items.description: A changing collection of nuts gathered by Scout.

items.name: Leo's Notebook
items.description: A small notebook where Leo records finds, sketches maps, and writes documentary notes.

items.name: Cardboard Camera
items.description: A homemade cardboard camera used by Leo to pretend to film their documentary.

items.name: Old Map
items.description: A weathered hand-drawn map with simple symbols, found under the oak roots and kept in the treehouse.

items.name: Pottery Shard
items.description: A small painted pottery fragment found by the river, wrapped in a leaf and stored carefully.

items.name: River Stone Sample
items.description: A small piece of mortar and a worn stone collected near the river steps, wrapped in a leaf and kept for careful study.
